feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why is she such a bitch?
entry.content: Playing through B-K for the first time and holy shit, she is insufferable. She's always mocking and undermining Banjo at every opportunity even though he does most of the work and she's extremely rude to everyone they meet. Legitimately, what the FUCK is her problem?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: StarFox for Switch 2
entry.content: Overall, I like it, I just think whoever decided that the laser and bomb buttons should be on opposite sides of the face button should be fired and never work in the games industry ever again. Did anyone else pick this up? One of the major things I like is the little narrative explanations for the route splits. The Sector Y fleet being sent to reinforce the Katina outpost is kind of how I always figured it would go down.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: New Owner of the Fallout Franchise Interviews
entry.content: Josh Sawyer, who now owns Fallout, has done interviews where he talks about his plans for FNV2 on his youtube channel. Here are some relevant points. >How do you feel about the Fallout IP and other worlds you helped create? >"I know this will sound crazy to some people, but I don't care *laughs*. It's not mine, it was never mine. That's my mentality with all the stuff that I do. I don't have control over the IP that I develop while working for another company. I'm certainly able to give my opini

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How secure is Andriod these days
entry.content: >inb4 jamal Just wondering how far andriod has come in terms of being secure, works had me on an iphone for a long time. I'm traveling abroad and want a personal device with me, google fi has some cheap deals but all are Android (moto g 2026) which looks to be andriod 16. How far has security on it come along? Last real device I had was 6.0 and I recall tons of lock screen exploits to bypass. Assuming I do a 6 digit pin and side finger print sensor style phone, if someone were to yank it take ou

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: TMZ: HE WAS JUST FOUND
entry.content: Twitter leaked the awful news and now TMZ all but confirming, link below >"Heaven has gained an angel, but the world has just lost a legendary funnyman. It is reported that the beloved former Saturday night alum and Osmosis Jones star was found responsive in his Palo Alto home early Sunday by a housekeeper. No official statements from family or Palo Alto County Offices, but insider chatter points towards a private personal battle with an undisclosed matter. The comedian actor was 75.” Damn, way

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Led Zeppelin III [Atlantic, 1970] If the great blues guitarists can make their i…
entry.content: Led Zeppelin III [Atlantic, 1970] If the great blues guitarists can make their instruments cry out like human voices, it's only fitting that Robert Plant should make his voice galvanize like an electric guitar. I've always approved theoretically of the formula that pits the untiring freak intensity of that voice against Jimmy Page's repeated low-register fuzz riffs, and here they really whip it into shape. Plant is overpowering even when Page goes to his acoustic, as he does to great effect on s

entry.title: /b/ Random: Can we get a Sara Jay thread?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: AI is advancing at a ridiculous pace. 3 years ago those LLMs couldn't solve basi…
entry.content: AI is advancing at a ridiculous pace. 3 years ago those LLMs couldn't solve basic math problems, now they are solving big open problems in combinatorics and acing the math olympics reliably. 2 years ago they could barely code a simple game, AI coding was telling the dumb machine over and over to correct a mistake and it would be incapable of fixing the mistake without making like 3-4 new mistakes. And now they are pretty decent devs, finding exploits in software who was deemed safe by experts fo

entry.title: /g/ Technology: new or old technology all is meaningless, Elon's satellites can now serve every …
entry.content: new or old technology all is meaningless, Elon's satellites can now serve every single regular cellphone signal from space if he wanted to, this is how T-Mobile satellite emergency coms work now. If you have an iPhone you have access to emergency satellites, but if you have T-mobile you have 3 modes of remote communication, LTE, satellite, emergency satellite. Elon can basically now handshake with every single cellphone on earth and triangulate it with high precision. Elon's satellites all have

entry.title: /o/ Auto: On the road again!
entry.content: Helping a friend move across 4 states, 15± hours of driving. Never taken on such a task before, any tips for hours and hours of driving? Staying awake at the wheel? (Caffeine does absolutely nothing for me.) How to keep my ass from getting sore sitting for so long? Peeing in bottles? I will be flying to them, then we will take turns both driving the same vehicle back to my city. Already talked them into splitting it into 2 days and getting a hotel somewhere in the middle.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: older cars with aura
entry.content: hey /o/ so im going through a midlife crisis after a lot of consecutively bad things have happened in my life. after driving an sensible econobox for decades im looking for a car to give me a little joy in life that has aura and presence. I don’t mind if this is a project car. I want something that looks cool, that I can maybe get for a good price and that I can work on. I will still drive my econobox to work but want this to be a cool car for going out. I’m thinking an older MB a 560SL, an BMW

entry.title: /int/ International: Nice casual outfit to do business in Budapest. The polished nails raise some eye…
entry.content: Nice casual outfit to do business in Budapest. The polished nails raise some eyebrows when paying at checkouts, and the cropped tee also draws attention when I enter the store, but it is what it is. I'm assuming no one really recognises my lipstick. How would get away with this outfit in your city?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: just watch it: I dounderstand why peoples can't stop talking about this movie de…
entry.content: just watch it: I dounderstand why peoples can't stop talking about this movie despite the scenario being basic. It starts like a very sweet teenage romance movie then shit begins to feel very wrong especially when Nikki made a memorial for Sandy . There were times where we couldn't tell if Nikki behaviour was a product of the wish or if she was always that crazy especially in the beginning when her crazy self was still "manageable". Some moments were umconfortably funny like when Freaky Nikki sc

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Historic does not mean people care
